title: geum microcephalum
intro: Geum microcephalum, also known as the alpine avens, is a perennial plant species in the rose family native to alpine regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, Geum microcephalum is often used in teas, infusions, or as a dried extract to harness its medicinal properties, but proper dosages and preparation methods should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
